series_metadata.series_description: Any official documentation explaining the absence of an employee from normal working hours, including such items as a doctors excuse or a relatives obituary notice.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. If Federal funds are involved, retain for 3 years unless there is a finding. Then retain until after the finding is resolved., Paper: Shred
